MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. HEARING TO TAKE PLACE IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON THE SAME DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS ADDRESSING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND BANKRUPTCY SCHEDULE ISSUE. PLAINTIFF SHALL FURTHER JOIN THE NEW OWNER OF THE PROPERTY AND THE CO-BORROWER'S ESTATE AS PARTIES TO THIS ACTION. THE COURT MAKES NO RULINGS AS TO OTHER ARGUMENTS RAISED IN THE DEMURRER AT THIS TIME AND THEY MAY BE RAISED IN FUTURE MOTIONS IF NECESSARY AT THAT TIME. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (D501)
